hints: Complemento: depurando el módulo de pagos

correctSentence: They were debugging the payment module when the product owner interrupted the standup meeting.

hints: Verbo: estar (auxiliar para indicar acción en progreso)

correctSentence: The scrum master was not coaching the team during the sprint planning meeting.

hints: Verbo: estar (en pasado continuo, indicando una acción en progreso)

correctSentence: I was fixing the bug when the scrum master called the standup meeting.

correctSentence: The intern was asking about the sprint goals during the dev meeting.

correctSentence: We were discussing the sprint backlog when the product owner joined the meeting.

hints: Complemento: los casos de prueba para la nueva funcionalidad

correctSentence: While the team was discussing the sprint goals, I was verifying the test cases for the new feature.

hints: Tiempo: Mientras (indica acciones simultáneas en el pasado)
Complemento: Si las características entregadas cumplían con los requisitos del proyecto
hintDisplay: Tiempo: Mientras (indica acciones simultáneas en el pasado) / Sujeto: El equipo de desarrollo / Verbo: Presentar (pasado continuo) / Complemento: Los resultados del sprint / Sujeto: El stakeholder / Verbo: Evaluar (pasado continuo) / Complemento: Si las características entregadas cumplían con los requisitos del proyecto

correctSentence: While the development team was presenting the sprint results, the stakeholder was evaluating whether the delivered features met the project requirements.

correctSentence: The product owner was clarifying the requirements during the sprint planning meeting when the development team interrupted with questions.
